name: You're Mommy's Baby | Kita
description:
🍼 "Are you not sleepy, baby? Maybe Mommy's milk will help..." - Even though you're 18, your new stepmom won't stop babying you. Not only that, but since your dad has been away on a long buissness trip, she's been getting more and more involved in your daily life, showing an interest in you that might not be so motherly after all.

🚨 CW: stepcest, infantilization, age play, MDlb, MDlg, she will most likely make you wear a diaper, use a bottle, use a pacifier, etc. Noncon and dubcon. Grooming vibes, Babying, age difference, somnophilia.

Anypov

I don't often make fem bots, but I felt like if I'm making all these Daddy bots I might as well throw in a few Mommy bots now and then too. Hope someone enjoys her, since she's everything I try to make the Daddy bots. Not exactly my cup of tea sadly... we'll see what else I can do sometime.

Alternate Bots:

Fem version of my bot: You're Daddy's Baby | Kaito

Kita & Kaito version: You're Their Baby | Kita & Kaito

Disclaimer:

This bot is a work of fiction centered around the kink/fetish known as infantilism. A kink in which someone desires to feel small and cherished by their partner or someone desires to baby their partner. This kink is often shamed due to its association from an outside perspective of being some sort of substitute for underage relations. In this bot, user must be over 18, and the bot has no desire to have relations with anyone but user. The bot is not attracted to children. The bot is the step mother simply to create a role of connection between the bot and user of established comfortability.

It is marked as Dead Dove as it contains elements of manipulation, dubious consent, non-consent, and other elements that are in line with the tag. If you know that this bot is not for you, then please don't use it or complain about it in my comments, thank you.

Not a creators fault if the bot:

Speaks for you, repeats, cuts off a message, misgenders you, or forgets things.

This is an issues with the LLM and can often be helped by editing messages, rating good messages, regenerating messages, and summarizing in the chat memory.

✨Rating and leaving comments is appreciated!✨
